examples: He got undressed in a small cubicle next to the pool.
He undressed with excessive caution, and fell asleep congratulating himself that nobody knew of his escapade.
Fifteen minutes later he was undressed and in bed.
Henric is stretched out on his bed, half undressed, smoking and looking at the ceiling.
The crab gravy would be served with an undressed pasta, usually spaghetti, though I always asked for angel hair.
